content.fact_text: A production-ready, circuit-broken Redis client wrapper implementing the ioredis library with structured logging and fault tolerance.

provenance_data.behaviour: The RedisClient provides a fault-tolerant, circuit-broken, Singleton-patterned interface for Redis caching. It manages connections, handles retries, performs JSON serialization/deserialization, and monitors health status. The circuit breaker (Opossum) prevents cascading failures during high-load or Redis downtime, and structured logging is integrated via Pino.
interfaces: public async get<T>(key: string): Promise<T | null>
public async set(key: string, value: any, ttlSeconds?: number): Promise<void>
public async hset(key: string, field: string, value: any): Promise<void>
public async hget<T>(key: string, field: string): Promise<T | null>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, fault-tolerant interface for Redis interaction in the ecommerce service, ensuring cache consistency and availability.
